# JINHONG (WZJH) Design System

> The official design system for Wenzhou Jinhong Electric Co., Ltd. (温州金宏电器有限公司,
> brand JINHONG, wordmark ZJWZJH) — a mid‑to‑high‑end manufacturer of industrial electrical
> control components (pushbutton switches, indicator & tower lights, relays, isolator
> switches, fuse holders, foot switches, battery‑free wireless switches, enclosures).
> Use these files to generate stunning, perfectly on‑brand websites and presentations.
> Token‑driven, WCAG‑AA verified, bilingual EN + 简体中文. Light theme only.

## Start here
- [Master spec — wzjh-design-system.md](wzjh-design-system.md): the complete, copy‑paste‑ready specification. Read this first.
- [Generation guardrails — FOR-AI.md](FOR-AI.md): strict rules + a self‑check to run against your output.

## Tokens (source of truth)
- [CSS variables — tokens/wzjh-tokens.css](tokens/wzjh-tokens.css): runtime tokens. Link this before any CSS.
- [Component classes — wzjh.css](wzjh.css): ready `.wzjh-*` component library.
- [DTCG JSON — tokens/wzjh-tokens.json](tokens/wzjh-tokens.json): machine‑readable tokens for Figma/Style Dictionary/generators.

## Presentations
- [Slide‑deck system — FOR-PRESENTATIONS.md](FOR-PRESENTATIONS.md): 16:9 deck rules, five slide layouts.
- [Deck styles — presentation/deck.css](presentation/deck.css) and [template — presentation/template.html](presentation/template.html).

## See it
- [Showcase — index.html](index.html): live component & pattern gallery (GitHub Pages entry).
- [Brand book — brandbook.html](brandbook.html): visual brand guidelines.
- [Examples — examples/](examples/): full example pages (homepage, product, RFQ) and a slide.

## Key rules (cheat sheet)
- Brand blue #0BA1E2 is decorative only (2.91:1). Use --wzjh-action (#0A6FB0) for text/links/buttons.
- Body text --wzjh-text (#2F2725). Danger red #A3201A only for e‑stop/errors.
- One font stack (var(--wzjh-font-sans)); type scale only; rem units; sharp corners; no dark mode.
- Never invent tokens, fonts, product photos, logos, or certifications.

## License & assets
- [LICENSE](LICENSE): code + tokens are MIT; the "JINHONG"/"ZJWZJH" trademarks, logo, and the proprietary "zt_rol" font are excluded — see file.
